timeline.event: Ana kyautata zaton an haife shi ne a jihar Chu a lokacin Daular Zhou.
Ya yi aiki a matsayin ma'aikacin rumbun ajiya na gidan sarautar Zhou.
Kamar yadda labari ya nuna, ya hadu da matashin Confucius inda suka tattauna akan falsafa da al'adu.
Ya bar Daular Zhou wacce ke durkushewa, inda ya hau saniya ya nufi yamma.
Bayan ya rubuta 'Tao Te Ching' a kofar iyakar yamma, ya bace a tarihi.
An haife shi a Stagira dake yankin Thrace a arewacin Girka.
Ya shiga makarantar Plato (Academy) yana da shekaru 17.
Kafin mutuwar Plato, ya tafi Atarneus a bisa goron gayyata na Hermias.
Sarki Philip II na Makidoniya ya sa ya koma Mieza a matsayin malamin Yarima Alexander.
Bayan Alexander ya fara gudanar da mulki, ya koma Stagira don cigaba da bincike.
Ya koma Athens inda ya kafa makarantar Lyceum kuma ya shafe shekaru 12 yana karantarwa da bincike.
Bayan mutuwar Iskandar Makidoniye, ya gudu zuwa Chalcis wato garin mahaifiyarsa don gujewa masu adawa da Makidoniya.
Ya mutu sakamakon ciwon ciki yana da shekaru 63.

keyAchievements.title: Kirkirar Tsarin Falsafar Yammacin Turai
keyAchievements.description: Shi ya fara kirkirar tsari mai yawa na falsafar yammacin Turai wanda ya hada da da'a, kimiyya, siyasa, da sauransu.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa dakin karatu a Lyceum da gidan ajiye dabbobi
keyAchievements.description: Tare da taimakon Iskandar Makidoniye, ya gina dakin karatu a makarantar Lyceum sannan ya kafa gidan ajiye dabbobi na farko a duniya.

keyAchievements.title: Gaba a Fannin Logic
keyAchievements.description: Ya zama jigo a fannin ilimin logic ta hanyar wallafa ayyukansa sannan kuma ya kirkiro tsarin 'syllogism'.

keyAchievements.title: Bincike a fannin Dabbobi
keyAchievements.description: Ya lura da kuma rarraba dabbobi sama da nau'i 500 inda ya bari kyakkyawan bayani a kansu.

faq.question: Waye malamin Aristotle kuma waye dalibinsa?
faq.answer: Aristotle dalibi ne na Plato, kuma shi ne malamin Iskandar Makidoniye (Alexander the Great).

faq.question: Wadanne fannoni Aristotle ya wallafa littattafai akai?
faq.answer: Ya rubuta a kan darussa da yawa kamar physics, biology, dabbobi, siyasa, da sauransu.

faq.question: Mene ne asalin ilimin logic na Aristotle?
faq.answer: Misali mafi shahara a cikin ilimin logic na Aristotle shi ne tsarin 'syllogism' (ƙin yarda da hankali).

timeline.event: Haihuwa
A bisa gayyatar Dionysius II, ya tafi Sicily don gwada siyasarsa ta gari.
Mutuwa
Shekarar karshe da makarantar Academy da Plato ya kafa tayi aiki.

keyAchievements.title: Kirkirar Kwayoyin Ra'ayi na Falsafa (Objective Idealism)
keyAchievements.description: Shi ne masanin falsafar Girka da ya kirkiri tsarin Kwayoyin Ra'ayi.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Academy
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa kuma ya koyar a Academy, wacce ita ce makarantar farko dake matsayin jami'a a duniya.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta Jawabai na Falsafa
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta darussa a kan siyasa, da'a, da sauransu ta hanyar tattaunawa.

faq.question: Waye Plato?
faq.answer: Plato ɗalibi ne ga Socrates kuma malami ga Aristotle, sannan shi ne wanda ya kirkiri tsarin falsafa na 'Objective Idealism'.

faq.question: Wadanne ne manyan nasarorin Plato?
faq.answer: Ya kirkiri tsarin Idealism, ya kafa makarantar Academy, sannan ya fitar da Falsafar sa kan Sarakuna.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Stratford, Ingila.
Saboda tabarbarewar arzikin gidan, ya bar makaranta ya koma taimakawa a gida.
Ya auri Anne Hathaway wacce ta girme shi da shekaru takwas, yana da shekaru 18.
Ya sami takardar amincewar aure a kotun majami'ar Worcester.
Ya sami diyarsa Susanna.
An haifi tagwayen yara Hamnet da Judith.
Ya isa birnin London.
Ya shafe kimanin shekaru 24 yana rubuta wasannin kwaikwayo inda ya fitar da wasanni 38 da suka hada da na ban dariya da na bakin ciki.
Ana kyautata zaton cewa ya zama sanannen marubucin wasan kwaikwayo a London.
Ya wallafa wakar 'Venus and Adonis'.
Ya wallafa wakar 'Lucrece' sannan ya zama marubucin wasan kwaikwayo ga kungiyar Lord Chamberlain's Men.
An nuna wasansa 'A Midsummer Night's Dream' inda ya samu karbuwa sosai.
Kungiyar Lord Chamberlain's Men ta gina filin wasa na Globe kusa da kogin Thames.
Bayan mutuwar Sarauniya Elizabeth I, kungiyar ta canza suna zuwa King's Men.
Diyarsa Susanna ta auri likita John Hall.
An wallafa wakokinsa na 'Shakespeare's Sonnets'.
Ya dawo garinsu na Stratford 'yan shekaru kadan kafin mutuwarsa.
An gayyace shi a matsayin shaida a kotu dangane da wani aure.
Ya sayi wani tsohon gida a London Blackfriars.
Karamin diyarsa Judith ta auri Thomas Quiney.
Ya mutu inda ya bar matarsa da 'ya'yansa biyu.
An fitar da cikakken kundin wasanninsa da ya kunshi wasanni 36.

keyAchievements.title: Matsayi a matsayin Mafi Girman Marubucin Ingila
keyAchievements.description: Ya hau matsayin babban marubuci a lokacin ransa kuma ya samu yabo sosai.

keyAchievements.title: Kirkirar Littattafan Gargajiya
keyAchievements.description: Wasan kwaikwayonsa kamar 'Romeo and Juliet' da 'Hamlet' sun zama abin misali a tsakanin mutane.

keyAchievements.title: Gaba a Harshen Turanci
keyAchievements.description: Ayyukansa sun ba da gagarumar gudunmawa wajen inganta harshen Turanci na zamani.

faq.question: Shin William Shakespeare ya sami ilimin jami'a?
faq.answer: A'a, bai sami kowane ilimi na gaba da sakandare ba, amma hazakarsa ta sa ya zama babban marubuci.

faq.question: Wadanne ne manyan wasanninsa na bakin ciki guda hudu?
faq.answer: Wasanninsa guda hudu na bakin ciki (Tragedies) sune 'Hamlet', 'Othello', 'King Lear', da 'Macbeth'.

william-shakespeare.missingDataNote: Ba a da cikakken bayani game da shekarun kuruciyarsa da ainihin farkon lokacin da ya fara rubuta wasannin kwaikwayo.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Ulm na masarautar Württemberg a Jamus.
Ya koma Switzerland.
Don gujewa aikin soja, ya bar shaidar dan kasar Jamus kuma ya shiga shirin koyon lissafi da Physics a Polytechnic na Zurich.
Ya ci jarrabawar physics da lissafi kuma an bashi diploma.
Ya zama dan kasar Switzerland.
Ya auri Mileva Marić kuma ya sami aiki a ofishin duba kirkiro na Switzerland da ke Bern.
Ya sami digirinsa na uku daga Jami'ar Zurich kuma ya fitar da kasidu guda hudu da suka juyar da al'amuran kimiya.
An nada shi malami a Jami'ar Bern.
Ya zama farfesa a Jami'ar Zurich.
Ya zama cikakken farfesa a Jami'ar Charles-Ferdinand da ke Prague.
Ya dawo Berlin don shiga cibiyar kimiya ta Prussian da Jami'ar Humboldt.
Ya kammala ka'idarsa ta General Relativity.
Ya zama darekta a cibiyar Kaiser Wilhelm Institute for Physics kuma ya sake zama dan kasar Jamus.
Ya auri Elsa Löwenthal bayan sakin matarsa ta farko kuma tsinkayensa ya zama gaskiya a duniya baki daya.
Ya lashe kyautar Nobel ta Physics.
Ya yi tafiye-tafiye zuwa Asiya da Palestine.
Sakamakon hawawan Hitler kan mulki, ya kasa komawa Jamus don haka ya bar shaidar dan kasarsa ya koma Amurka dindindin.
Ya sanya hannu a wasika zuwa ga Shugaba Roosevelt don gargaɗi a kan shirin Jamus na yin makamin nukiliya.
Ya zama dan kasar Amurka.
Ya mutu yana da shekaru 76.

keyAchievements.title: Samar da Ka'idojin Relativity
keyAchievements.description: Ya canza yadda ake fahimtar sarari da lokaci ta hanyar samar da Special da General Relativity.

keyAchievements.title: Samar da Lissafin E=mc²
keyAchievements.description: Ya samar da lissafin E=mc² wanda ke nuna dangantaka tsakanin nauyi da karfi.

keyAchievements.title: Ka'idar Photoelectric Effect
keyAchievements.description: Ya nuna cewa haske yana aiki a matsayin barbashi (photons), wanda yasa ya lashe kyautar Nobel a Physics.

faq.question: Meyasa Albert Einstein ya sami lambar yabo ta Nobel?
faq.answer: Ya sami kyautar Nobel a 1921 a fannin Physics don ayyukansa a kan 'photoelectric effect'.

faq.question: Menene mafi shaharar kirkirar Einstein?
faq.answer: Lissafinsa na E=mc² sannan da ka'idojinsa na Relativity wanda suka canza kimiyya.

faq.question: Meyasa Einstein ya bar Jamus zuwa Amurka?
faq.answer: Sakamakon hawawan Adolf Hitler a kan karagar mulki a shekarar 1933 wanda ya kawo cikas ga Yahudawa.
